records.question: Where are the county public safety areas located in the East with populations of at least 128165, case burdens of at least 81, and residents per officer of at least 685, in Aguadilla where white is at most 83.0, Asian is at least 0.2, and multiracial is at least 8.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE city.white <= 83.0 AND city.name = 'Aguadilla' AND county_public_safety.location = 'East' AND city.asian >= 0.2 AND county_public_safety.case_burden >= 81 AND county_public_safety.population >= 128165 AND county_public_safety.residents_per_officer >= 685 AND city.multiracial >= 8.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cps.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety cps
JOIN city c ON cps.County_ID = c.County_ID
WHERE cps.Location = 'East'
  AND cps.Population >= 128165
  AND cps.Case_burden >= 81
  AND cps.Residents_per_officer >= 685
  AND c.Name = 'Aguadilla'
  AND c.White <= 83.0
  AND c.Asian >= 0.2
  AND c.Multiracial >= 8.2
